changeSet.author: ahri-inventory
changeSet.comment: Optional link from inventory equipment to analyzer registry

column.name: analyzer_id
column.remarks: FK to clinlims.analyzer.id when item is equipment

changeSet.author: ahri-inventory
ahri-inventory
changeSet.comment: Reclassify CARTRIDGE rows that store equipment metadata to EQUIPMENT
changeSet.sql: UPDATE clinlims.inventory_item SET item_type = 'EQUIPMENT' WHERE item_type = 'CARTRIDGE' AND ( NULLIF(TRIM(model_number), '') IS NOT NULL OR NULLIF(TRIM(serial_number), '') IS NOT NULL OR NULLIF(TRIM(equipment_condition), '') IS NOT NULL OR NULLIF(TRIM(ahri_tag), '') IS NOT NULL );
